user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view newly arrived assets with asset ID, category, name, vendor, procured date, invoice number, approved quantity, total asset value and status, so that I can track inbound asset arrivals
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the New Asset Arrival List screen; When the list loads; Then arrivals are shown with asset ID, category, name, vendor, procured date, invoice number, approved quantity, total asset value and status

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add asset inward details, so that I can record new asset arrivals into the system
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the New Asset Arrival List screen; When I click Add asset inward details; Then I can enter and save the inward details for a newly arrived asset

user_story: As an approver, I want to filter arrivals by status such as Pending with me, Pending Approval or Approved, so that I can process arrivals awaiting my action
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the New Asset Arrival List screen; When I select a status and search; Then only arrivals with that status are listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter arrivals by period and asset category, so that I can narrow arrivals to a timeframe and category
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the New Asset Arrival List screen; When I set a period range and select an asset category and search; Then only matching arrivals are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the arrival filters, so that I can clear my selections and view all arrivals
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied period, status or category filters; When I click Reset; Then all filters clear and the full arrival list is restored
